'''vahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeply|yeply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeply|yeply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vahate|vahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vahatesher|vahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahatesherĂ«m|vahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vahatero|vahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vahateshĂ«|vahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahateshĂ«m|vahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivahatero|gokivahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivahateshĂ«|gokivahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahateshĂ«m|gokivahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govahankerom|govahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govahankeshĂ«|govahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govahankeshĂ«m|govahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govahankeya|govahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vahaterom|vahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahatemu|vahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vahateya|vahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivahaterom|gokivahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahatemu|gokivahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivahateya|gokivahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vahahate|vahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vahahatesher|vahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahahatesherĂ«m|vahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vahahatero|vahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vahahateshĂ«|vahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahahateshĂ«m|vahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivahahatero|gokivahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivahahateshĂ«|gokivahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahahateshĂ«m|gokivahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govahahankerom|govahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govahahankeshĂ«|govahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govahahankeshĂ«m|govahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govahahankeya|govahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vahahaterom|vahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vahahatemu|vahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vahahateya|vahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivahahaterom|gokivahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivahahatemu|gokivahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivahahateya|gokivahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠte|vĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠtesher|vĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠtero|vĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠtero|gokivĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠhĂŠnkerom|govĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠhĂŠnkeya|govĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠterom|vĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠtemu|vĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠhĂŠteya|vĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠterom|gokivĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠhĂŠteya|gokivĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafhafte|vafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafhaftesher|vafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafhaftesherĂ«m|vafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafhaftero|vafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafhafteshĂ«|vafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafhafteshĂ«m|vafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafhaftero|gokivafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafhafteshĂ«|gokivafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafhafteshĂ«m|gokivafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafhafnkerom|govafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafhafnkeshĂ«|govafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafhafnkeshĂ«m|govafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafhafnkeya|govafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafhafterom|vafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafhaftemu|vafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafhafteya|vafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafhafterom|gokivafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafhaftemu|gokivafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafhafteya|gokivafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
